description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring a mix of white and orange-brown exterior wall panels. The structure is surrounded by a well-manicured garden with palm trees, shrubs, and a rectangular swimming pool at the front. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway, a garage, and landscaped walkways bordered by greenery. The upper story is set back, creating a partial terrace area. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on open, outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and orange-brown walls, large windows, and a landscaped garden featuring palm trees and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, palm trees, and the swimming pool prominently in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a row of tall, narrow shrubs along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional windows, and a secondary entrance with more greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace area, more palm trees, and the pool from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large, scattered windows and sliding glass doors
